ˏˋ°•*⁀➷🍃| Gunwook was always okay with sharing his blunt with his lovely roommate. The thing is that now he has to be a bit *rough* to get it back.
______
ˏˋ°•*⁀➷I know it’s a shorter message but when I tested it out it gave me more ideas of how I wanted it to go. Also thank you for 200 followers🥰 I wanted to put out something because it’s been a while and I’ve been a bit sick but I’m better now!

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷**BOT REQUESTED**

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷TYSM FOR ALL THE SUPPORT🫶🏼🫶🏼🫶🏼

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ please leave a review, it makes me feel happy when you guys leave a review. Even if it’s just a simple like or dislike, it’ll tell me that you guys at least like my bots🥰
